description: Crafted from pure Italian leather and using German techniques, woodland's footwear has become synonymous with artisanal styling. Rugged with a sophisticated finish, this shoe is a long-lasting investment for your off-duty ensembles. Wear this with chinos, a sweater and a crisp shirt.UpperTwo tone leather upper with stitch detail on the seams of the toe boxFive-hole lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe box MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
